dataset_name: retention.sh Profile Edit Flow — Trajectory + Learning Package

review_process.review_methodology: Dual review: automated checkpoint validation + human audit of optimization candidates and policy labels

intended_uses: Vertical model fine-tuning for mobile QA workflows
Reward modeling for replay-vs-explore policy optimization
prohibited_uses: Training models to automate actions on Instagram without authorization
Extracting or reconstructing user PII from trajectories
Selling or distributing raw trajectory data to third parties
Using data to bypass app security measures or rate limits
known_limitations: Data collected on single device config (Pixel 8, API 35) — may not generalize to all Android devices
Instagram app version 345.x — UI elements may change in future versions
English locale only — other locales may have different element selectors
Toast timing variability (800-2200ms) may cause drift on slower devices
risks: Trajectory shortcuts may become invalid after Instagram UI updates
Drift score may underestimate real-world UI variability
